title: Shared-species comparison pages v1
summary: Sixteenth structured packet for Eco Explorer. The queue is clear of corrective implementation work, and the strongest grounded next slice is the shared-species comparison pass already prepared by scout-14. This should stay a compact same-pane journal detail enhancement built on the existing `Seen in:` row, multi-biome sightings model, and ecosystem-note summaries rather than becoming a new encyclopedia mode.

execution_order.goal: Add compact same-pane comparison cards for the strongest shared species that have already been seen in more than one biome.
execution_order.why_now: This builds directly on stable journal and multi-biome systems and deepens ecotone teaching without opening a broader new gameplay layer.

execution_order.goal: Review the comparison-page pass for readability, spoiler safety, and ecology teaching quality.
execution_order.why_now: This is a high-leverage journal feature and should get a critique pass before sketchbook or other journal-depth work builds on it.

guardrails: Science accuracy remains a hard gate.
Keep the first pass inside the current journal detail pane instead of adding a new top-level journal mode.
Do not replace the entry's own journal text, ecosystem note, or `Seen in:` row.
Unlock comparison content only after the player has seen the same shared entry in at least two biomes.
Use note-backed habitat differences and conditions instead of repeating shared fact text.
Do not spoil unseen habitats by naming or describing them early.
Keep the initial candidate set narrow around entries with strong two-habitat note context such as `beach-grass`, `arctic-willow`, and `crowberry`.
Keep the comparison surface compact enough for the current `192x144` notebook shell.
acceptance_focus: Shared species gain a clear cross-habitat teaching layer.
The journal stays calm and notebook-like.
Only locally unlocked habitats appear in comparison content.
The feature teaches difference in role, neighbors, shelter, or exposure instead of becoming a fact dump.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-depth-and-game-feel-sequence.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-shared-species-comparison-handoff.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-multi-biome-sightings-handoff.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-local-sighting-progression-fix-review.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-dense-journal-navigation-review.md, and this packet. Implement a compact same-pane journal comparison mode for the strongest shared species entries already seen in multiple biomes. Reuse the current detail pane and note-backed habitat differences instead of inventing a new encyclopedia surface.
